scope: AgenC memory privacy and scoping helpers live in runtime/src/memory/privacy.ts and protect durable/team/session memory surfaces.

requiredBehaviors: Classifies durable global and project memory paths as personal memory.
Classifies team-memory subpaths as team memory before the broader durable-memory match.
Detects session-memory and transcript files only under the AgenC config directory.
Detects shell commands and directory arguments that target managed memory paths.
edgeCases: A project instruction file outside a managed memory directory is not treated as auto-managed memory.
A shell command that mentions an unrelated absolute path is not treated as memory access.

requiredBehaviors: Scans memory content with high-confidence credential prefix rules.
Returns rule IDs and human labels without returning matched secret values.
Redacts matched secret spans while preserving surrounding boundary text.
edgeCases: Duplicate matches from the same rule produce one reported match.
Provider names with initialisms keep canonical display casing.

requiredBehaviors: Rejects secret-bearing file writes and edits only when the target path is inside team memory.
Keeps non-team memory writes subject to normal permission flow instead of the team-memory secret guard.
Runs the same scanner before team-memory sync uploads so secret-bearing files never enter the upload payload.
edgeCases: A secret-like string outside team memory does not trigger the team-memory write guard.
